name: @openfinance-os/data-sandbox
description: Open Finance Data Sandbox — interactive client-side explorer for UAE Open Finance Bank Data Sharing payloads. Synthetic data, narratively realistic personas, spec-driven badges. OF-OS Commons contribution.

scripts.build:site: npm run build:spec && npm run build:data && node tools/build-fixture-package.mjs && node tools/build-fixture-package-py.mjs && node tools/stage-site.mjs
scripts.build:fixtures: npm run build:spec && node tools/build-fixture-package.mjs && node tools/build-fixture-package-py.mjs
scripts.lint: npm run lint:no-handauthored && npm run lint:no-institution-leak && npm run lint:pii-leak && npm run lint:no-glyph-only && npm run lint:persona-spec-conformance && npm run lint:stress-coverage-uniqueness
scripts.ci: npm run verify:spec-shape && npm run build:spec && npm run lint && npm test
